name: frontier_castle
description: Battle Castle hall clear (q.side_frontier_hall lane), re-cut for the FrontierManager castle-points economy: the fights STAY dialog do:battle (Knight Aldric and Guard Captain Elara one_time challengers, then Castle Lord Percival the brain, all TBCS onwin), but the run now rides the points ledger - 'Open the house ledger' (frontier castle enter, 60-point budget), 'Buy intel - 15 points' (castle scout reads the next un-defeated gate's bundled rctmod team), 'Buy the physician - 20 points' (castle heal between fights, the mechanic replacing the old rcon heal there), and after the Lord falls 'Settle the ledger' (castle claim pays leftover points x15 CD). Claim gates on defeated_frontier_brain_castle - Percival's dialog battle defeat_tag is frontier_castle_cleared, so his on_win now ALSO grants the brain tag to align with the manager's tag surface (asserted here); a pre-defeat claim via rcon asserts the refusal line. Point rail asserted at every spend: 60 -> 45 (scout) -> 25 (physician) -> 25 (refusal untouched) -> 0 (claim). Exact CD read: wallet zeroed AFTER the brain's 3000 dialog prize, so the claim's 25x15=375 sits under the 1000 query abbreviation. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery (gate.champion lowers to royal_league_champion); fights run under dev-bot autobattle with the wonder team (locked fights do not exist here - castle fights are never level-locked, the wonder team just wins). Site is the shipped RCT frontier cluster at y159; the preamble asserts frontier_active (region_tick AABB) for the no-death exhibition promise. KNOWN CAVEAT: the intermittent TBCS battle-init stall (and the rarer showdown engine wedge) means a win-wait timeout is almost certainly NOT a hall regression - re-run before filing (wedge recovery: blind rctapi maps then dev showdown revive).

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog from a prior scenario, then sweep a stale battle (stopbattle fires no event; the sleep lets TBCS liveness settle) --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep below + the 40b hall latches spawn Aldric/Elara/Percival if the world is fresh). Coordinate is 2b north of the shipped Castle gate line (ch1 3785.5 / ch2 3791.5 at z2962.5, brain 3788.5 z2968.5) - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage. Armor stands excluded (TBCS anchors + FrontierManager anchor stands), NPC bodies + pokemon excluded

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or its battles set, the champion gate surgery, and the castle-points objective. No latch resets - the three bodies persist (one_time challengers and gym_leader brains never despawn on win) --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup - later scenarios assume a fresh low-badge player
ensure-create: FrontierManager makes the objective lazily on the first castle command - on a fresh world the reset below would error without this (fails harmlessly if it already exists)
points residue from a failed run would skew every spend assert below
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses (no_defeated_castle_challenger_* and no_frontier_castle_cleared) after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared, and the region tick has painted the safe-exhibition tag --

steps.comment_: frontier/region_tick AABB - the trigger NuzlockeInit reads for the no-death exhibition

steps.comment: -- party reset: junk lv-5 parties from earlier scenarios stall TBCS battle init (verified live in wheat_war). Empty all six slots, then the wonder team - attrition headroom for three straight ceiling fights (the doubles brain needs two able mons anyway) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle).

execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.comment: -- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --

-- brain latch re-arm (2026-07-19): a consumed fight leaves the brain BODY gone with #amb=1 — every later run finds nothing (all 7 brains were bodiless by round 4; three scenarios then false-matched STALE buffer win lines). Kill any stale body + reset the latch; the 40b approach respawns him fresh. --

-- leaked-battle sweep (2026-07-19): an aborted prior scenario can leave a live battle + a dead manager dispatch entry; stopbattle ends the battle (harmless no-op when clean) and the sleep lets the Java self-heal clear the dead dispatch (~2s) before the first hall command --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 0: the house ledger opens. Percival's default entry carries the services buttons (stable asserts regardless of say rotation); enter sets the 60-point budget and prints the house terms --

steps.comment_: a leaked battle GUI can sit UNDER the dialog and surface when the button closes it — close whatever tops the stack and let the chat wait pace the beat (wisps idiom); a wait_no_screen here raced exactly that (live-caught 2026-07-19)
FrontierManager castle enter announce - the 60-point terms line (budget/heal/scout/rate)

steps.comment: -- beat 0b: intel, discreetly. Scout reads the NEXT un-defeated gate (Aldric, nothing beaten yet) from the bundled rctmod team JSON and bills 15 points --

steps.comment_: service buttons are command-only (no close — the ledger menu stays open by design); close it ourselves (live-caught round 3)

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Knight Aldric, the gate (dialog do:battle, untouched by the manager). say[] rotates, so the screen assert targets the stable battle-button label (its rendering IS the champion-gate assert) --

steps.comment_: pre-ladder heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss); between-fights healing below goes through the POINTS physician instead
battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up
Aldric's onwin win_line say; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
battle teardown settle before the next TBCS dispatch

steps.comment: -- beat 2: the physician between fights, bought with POINTS (the mechanic replaces the old rcon heal here): -20, full heal via console healpokemon --

steps.comment_: service buttons are command-only (no close — the ledger menu stays open by design); close it ourselves (live-caught round 3)

steps.comment: -- beat 3: Guard Captain Elara, the wall (dialog do:battle) - entered on the physician's heal, no rcon heal --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side

steps.wait_chat: The wall yields to the steadier hand

steps.comment_: defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
battle teardown settle + band_tags window before the brain's all_tags gate is read

steps.comment: -- beat 4: the ledger refuses to settle before the Lord falls (castle claim gates on defeated_frontier_brain_castle) - rail assert via rcon, points untouched --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative frontier castle claim

steps.wait_chat: The ledger settles when the Castle Lord has yielded

steps.comment_: the refusal must not touch the balance

steps.comment: -- beat 5: Castle Lord Percival (dialog do:battle). His battle button gates all_tags on both challenger defeats - it rendering now IS the ladder assert. Win chain: prize -> frontier_castle_cleared tag -> win say -> on_win defeated_frontier_brain_castle (the manager-aligned brain tag that unlocks claim) -> frontier/hall_cleared (actionbar) --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side

steps.wait_chat: The wall of the keep breaks at last

steps.comment_: defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
Percival's on_win grants the manager-aligned brain tag - without it castle claim refuses forever

steps.comment: -- beat 6: settle the ledger. Beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_castle_cleared) preempts with the Settle button; wallet zeroed AFTER the 3000 dialog prize so the claim read is exact (query abbreviates >=1000): 25 points x 15 = 375 CD --

expect_screen_text: The keep is yours. Old money, older rules, and you honoured every one - I could not ask for a cleaner victor.
I keep saying I know that face from somewhere. No matter. A caretaker of old forms keeps such thoughts to himself. Well fought, Champion.
The Castle stands defeated and stands grateful. Wonder built these halls once; you reminded me why.
The keep is yours and the ledger still stands open. Settle it with the house, Champion - what you did not spend on comfort is yours in coin.

steps.comment_: service buttons are command-only (no close — the ledger menu stays open by design); close it ourselves (live-caught round 3)
the claim's cobbledollars give runs console-side; settle before the exact read
25 leftover points x 15 CD rate
claim banks the ledger to zero

steps.comment: -- beat 7: the settled keep - beaten entry re-opens, take your leave --

-- cleanup: strip everything this scenario set (champion surgery + defeat ladder + hall clear + brain tag + points) so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD rides at the 375 claim (the prize rail has no reset, miller_walk precedent) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
